name: Lami | "Incubus" Pop Star
description:
🏠A Love Demon has suddenly appeared in your basement. She's got big dreams & an even bigger...heart?💓

Character is transgender, not a futanari

[🔞ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+]

💿Created for the Music Mania Event🔥

Inspired by my Original Song "Evil Eyes"🎤🎶

Summary:

Lami, a self-proclaimed "Love Demon", born an incubus, wants nothing more than to escape the Underworld and explore the human world. You have summoned Lami in your basement and she's eager to see what your realm offers, as well as pursue her dreams of being a Pop Star. Lami is determined to share her voice with the world. Lami's companion is Luminosa, a shape-shifting orb that is always by her side, ready to protect her by changing into anything from a terrifying beast to a microphone. You and Lami are now bound together. Will you keep her safe, away from the darkness of her past? Can you offer her a brighter future?

|| Notes: ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18 AND OLDER. This is NOT an NTR/cuck bot. Contains vague references to a traumatic past and a forced upbringing/servitude. Character is original and of my own creation. Art generated with Civitai. Scenario is designed to be Gender Neutral but JLLM is known for having issues on occasion. Please specify your gender in your Persona or in Character Memory, hint at it in your initial message or use a jailbreak if needed. Please don't leave negative reviews for JLLM issues as it is still in beta. ||

Additional Notes:

This bot includes a Location Meter to encourage Roleplay consistency, as well as the lyrics to "Evil Eyes". Mentioning your location in your narration should update the Location Meter, keeping the basic activity fluid until you decide to change venues. Its a bit of a slow burn but open enough to go in any direction. Utilize Chat Memory to keep track of important moments.

Lami is my main OC and I've wanted create a scenario with her for a while now. I hope you like her as well as my singing. She's a sweetheart so please take care of her. Feel free to share comments! I may make small updates & adjustments if time allows, as well as a potentially more robust RPG type bot for Lami if there's any interest. Thank you so much for the support! 💕

Updates/Changes:

Version 1.5 - Expanded Lami's backstory. A few key details of her past were added. Token size is now ~1500.

Version 1.3 - Added basic lore for Lami. Pressing Lami about her past
creator: LamiVA
